Short CV

She was born in Istanbul in 1997. She completed her high school education at Galatasaray High School in 2016. She graduated from Marmara University Faculty of Medicine, which she started in the same year as her high school graduation, in 2022. As a medical student, she had internship in pediatrics at the University of Wisconsin and psychiatry at the Mayo Clinic. During her medical school period, she served as the scientific supervisor of the Marmara Medical Student Congress and the president of the Student Scientific Research Club. Again, during her undergraduate education, she took part in TPD's activities for medical students and psychiatry research.

She has a certificate of use of experimental animals. She speaks English and French.
